'''Iwo Kulka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Kulka took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and fought against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] alongside his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. At the end of the war, the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] saw Kulka branded as a traitor. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Kulka [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|confronted]] [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] alongside several other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but was [[Death/Legends|slain]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
[[File:FirstBattleOfKashyyyk-EGTW.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Darth Vader prepares to strike down Kulka and Siadem Forte]]
Iwo Kulka, a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]], was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. After a time, Kulka passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|made]] a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="DL" />

As a Knight, Kulka took on a [[Iwo Kulka's Padawan|Padawan of his own]], training them in the ways of the Jedi as he had been taught. At the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Kulka accepted the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the newly created [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to combat the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]]. Fighting side-by-side with [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] over the course of the three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of war, Kulka and his apprentice were caught unawares when the Republic crumbled and its [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army, ordering them to kill their Jedi compatriots. Overrun by their troopers, Kulka's Padawan fell to the onslaught before Kulka was able to escape, disguised in the armor of a slain clone. Responding to fellow Knight [[Siadem Forte]]'s [[Emergency Code Nine Thirteen/Legends|emergency beacon]] on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]], Kulka aided Forte in leading a group of eight other Jedi—including [[Deran Nalual]], [[Klossi Anno]], [[Jambe Lu]], and [[Nam Poorf]]—in hijacking a [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]]. Fleeing the planet, the group was harried by [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170s]] and a light cruiser, which saw the death of two of the Jedi crew. Limping through space, the group met up with the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]'' and were given sanctuary by its [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Jula Shryne]].<ref name="DL" />

Traveling aboard Shryne's ship, the group soon grew with the arrival of Padawan [[Olee Starstone]] and her adopted Master and Jula Shryne's son, [[Roan Shryne]]. After a drawn out discussion on what their plan should be, Starstone convinced the Kulka and the other Jedi to go to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in order to find [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. After arriving and speaking with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] chieftains there, the world was [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|attacked]] by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was hunting the fugitive Jedi. Paired with Forte, the two Knights attacked together but were no match for Vader. After receiving a jab in the abdomen and a slash across the face from Vader's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Forte and Kulka were both [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] by Vader as they attempted to rise. [[Death/Legends|Dead]], Kulka's memory was further slandered when images of his body were used as [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi propaganda]] on the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]].<ref name="DL" />
